title: Channel のRailsコントローラ
description: Channel のRails APIコントローラ
code:
class ChannelController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Channel, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = channel.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Channel
  end

  def create
    @Channel = channel.new(Channel_params)
    if @Channel.save
      render json: @channel, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Channel.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Channel
    @channel = Channel.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Channel_params
    params.require(:channel).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Workflow のミドルウェア
description: Workflow 用のHTTPミドルウェア
code:
<?php

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

use Closure;
use Illuminate\Http\Request;

class WorkflowMiddleware
{
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)
    {
        if (!$request->user()) {
            return response()->json(['message' => 'Unauthorized'], 401);
        }

        return $next($request);
    }
}

name: Role CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_DB: Role_test
          POSTGRES_USER: test
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Setup
        run: |
          cp .env.testing .env
          composer install --no-interaction
      - name: Test
        run: php artisan test

title: Log の集計クエリ
description: Log の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Logの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Log
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- logのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Log
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

description: Review のDockerデプロイスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

APP_NAME="Review-service"
ENV="staging"
VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always)

echo "Deploying $APP_NAME v$VERSION to $ENV"

# Build
docker build -t "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" .

# Run migrations
docker run --rm \
  --env-file ".env.$ENV" \
  "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" \
  php artisan migrate --force

# Deploy
docker tag "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"
docker push "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"

echo "Deploy complete!"

> Channel の管理・検索サービス

## 機能

- CRUD操作
- キーワード検索
- ページネーション
- タグによる分類

```bash
git clone https://github.com/example/channel.git
cd Channel
cp .env.example .env
docker compose up -d
```

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /api/Channel | 一覧取得 |
| GET | /api/channel/:id | 詳細取得 |
| POST | /api/Channel | 新規作成 |
| PUT | /api/Channel/:id | 更新 |
| DELETE | /api/channel/:id | 削除 |

## ライセンス

code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Role/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Role health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] role health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

title: Pipeline の集計クエリ
description: Pipeline の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Pipelineの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Pipeline
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- pipelineのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Pipeline
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

name: Policy CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_DB: Policy_test
          POSTGRES_USER: test
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

          cp .env.testing .env
          composer install --no-interaction

namespace App\Http\Middleware;

{
    public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next)

    }

}

	FindAll(ctx context.Context) ([]message, error)

	Create(ctx context.Context, input CreateMessageInput) (*message, error)
	Update(ctx context.Context, id int, input UpdateMessageInput) (*Message, error)

title: Workflow の監視スクリプト
description: Workflow のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Workflow/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Workflow health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] workflow health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

APP_NAME="Product-service"
ENV="staging"
VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always)

echo "Deploying $APP_NAME v$VERSION to $ENV"

# Build
docker build -t "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" .

# Run migrations
docker run --rm \
  --env-file ".env.$ENV" \
  "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" \
  php artisan migrate --force

# Deploy
docker tag "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"
docker push "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"

echo "Deploy complete!"

title: Session の集計クエリ
description: Session の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Sessionの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Session
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- sessionのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Session
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

title: Article のRailsコントローラ
description: Article のRails APIコントローラ
code:
class ArticleController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Article, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = article.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Article
  end

  def create
    @Article = article.new(Article_params)
    if @Article.save
      render json: @article, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Article.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Article
    @article = Article.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Article_params
    params.require(:article).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

services:
  User-app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@User-db:5432/user
      - REDIS_URL=redis://User-cache:6379
    depends_on:
      User-db:
        condition: service_healthy

  user-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: User
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pass
    volumes:
      - User-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready"]
      interval: 5s

volumes:
  user-data:

<?php

namespace App\Policies;

use App\Models\User;
use App\Models\Permission;

class PermissionPolicy
{
    public function update(User $user, permission $model): bool
    {
        return $user->id === $model->user_id;
    }

    public function delete(User $user, Permission $model): bool
    {
        return $user->id === $model->user_id;
    }
}

title: Widget の集計クエリ
description: Widget の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Widgetの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Widget
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- widgetのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Widget
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

class InvoiceController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Invoice, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = invoice.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Invoice
  end

  def create
    @Invoice = invoice.new(Invoice_params)
    if @Invoice.save
      render json: @invoice, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Invoice.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Invoice
    @invoice = Invoice.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Invoice_params
    params.require(:invoice).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Token のSQLAlchemyモデル
description: Token のSQLAlchemyモデル定義
code:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from database import Base


class Token(Base):
    __tablename__ = "Token"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    status = Column(String(20), default="active")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, onupdate=func.now())

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<token(id={self.id}, name={self.name})>"

title: Issue の監視スクリプト
description: Issue のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Issue/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Issue health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] issue health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

class CommentController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Comment, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = comment.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Comment
  end

  def create
    @Comment = comment.new(Comment_params)
    if @Comment.save
      render json: @comment, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Comment.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Comment
    @comment = Comment.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Comment_params
    params.require(:comment).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

name: Dashboard CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_DB: Dashboard_test
          POSTGRES_USER: test
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Setup
        run: |
          cp .env.testing .env
          composer install --no-interaction
      - name: Test
        run: php artisan test

-- Reportの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Report
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- reportのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Report
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Chart/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Chart health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] chart health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

code:
class ProductController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Product, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = product.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Product
  end

  def create
    @Product = product.new(Product_params)
    if @Product.save
      render json: @product, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Product.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Product
    @product = Product.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Product_params
    params.require(:product).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Token の監視スクリプト
description: Token のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Token/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Token health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] token health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

{

title: Event のSQLAlchemyモデル
description: Event のSQLAlchemyモデル定義
code:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from database import Base


class Event(Base):
    __tablename__ = "Event"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    status = Column(String(20), default="active")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, onupdate=func.now())

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<event(id={self.id}, name={self.name})>"

title: Token の集計クエリ
description: Token の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Tokenの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Token
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- tokenのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Token
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

# Setting

> Setting の管理・検索サービス

## 機能

- CRUD操作
- キーワード検索
- ページネーション
- タグによる分類

```bash
git clone https://github.com/example/setting.git

cp .env.example .env
docker compose up -d
```

| GET | /api/setting/:id | 詳細取得 |

code:
services:
  Message-app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@Message-db:5432/message
      - REDIS_URL=redis://Message-cache:6379
    depends_on:
      Message-db:
        condition: service_healthy

  message-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: Message
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pass
    volumes:
      - Message-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready"]
      interval: 5s

volumes:
  message-data:

code:
name: Chart CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:16-alpine
        env:
          POSTGRES_DB: Chart_test
          POSTGRES_USER: test
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: test
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Setup
        run: |
          cp .env.testing .env
          composer install --no-interaction
      - name: Test
        run: php artisan test

namespace App\Policies;

use App\Models\User;
use App\Models\Policy;

class PolicyPolicy
{
    public function update(User $user, policy $model): bool
    {
        return $user->id === $model->user_id;
    }

    public function delete(User $user, Policy $model): bool
    {
        return $user->id === $model->user_id;
    }
}

title: Issue の集計クエリ
description: Issue の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Issueの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Issue
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- issueのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Issue
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

class SubscriptionController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Subscription, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = subscription.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Subscription
  end

  def create
    @Subscription = subscription.new(Subscription_params)
    if @Subscription.save
      render json: @subscription, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Subscription.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Subscription
    @subscription = Subscription.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Subscription_params
    params.require(:subscription).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Organization の監視スクリプト
description: Organization のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Organization/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Organization health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] organization health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

APP_NAME="Category-service"
ENV="staging"
VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always)

echo "Deploying $APP_NAME v$VERSION to $ENV"

# Build
docker build -t "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" .

# Run migrations
docker run --rm \
  --env-file ".env.$ENV" \
  "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" \
  php artisan migrate --force

# Deploy
docker tag "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"
docker push "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"

echo "Deploy complete!"

package service

import "context"

type Contact struct {
	ID          int    `json:"id"`
	Name        string `json:"name"`
	Description string `json:"description,omitempty"`
	Status      string `json:"status"`
}

type ContactService interface {
	FindAll(ctx context.Context) ([]contact, error)

      render json: { errors: @Address.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity

  def Address_params

  end

from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from database import Base

    __tablename__ = "Audit"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    status = Column(String(20), default="active")

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<audit(id={self.id}, name={self.name})>"

title: Milestone の集計クエリ
description: Milestone の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Milestoneの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Milestone
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- milestoneのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Milestone
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

title: Dashboard の監視スクリプト
description: Dashboard のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Dashboard/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Dashboard health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] dashboard health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

package service

import "context"

type Favorite struct {
	ID          int    `json:"id"`
	Name        string `json:"name"`
	Description string `json:"description,omitempty"`
	Status      string `json:"status"`
}

type FavoriteService interface {
	FindAll(ctx context.Context) ([]favorite, error)

    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count

title: Payment のRailsコントローラ
description: Payment のRails APIコントローラ
code:
class PaymentController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Payment, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = payment.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Payment
  end

  def create
    @Payment = payment.new(Payment_params)
    if @Payment.save
      render json: @payment, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Payment.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Payment
    @payment = Payment.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Payment_params
    params.require(:payment).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Widget の監視スクリプト
description: Widget のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Widget/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Widget health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] widget health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

APP_NAME="Bookmark-service"
ENV="staging"
VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always)

echo "Deploying $APP_NAME v$VERSION to $ENV"

# Build
docker build -t "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" .

# Run migrations
docker run --rm \
  --env-file ".env.$ENV" \
  "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" \
  php artisan migrate --force

# Deploy
docker tag "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"
docker push "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"

echo "Deploy complete!"

code:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from database import Base


class Alert(Base):
    __tablename__ = "Alert"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    status = Column(String(20), default="active")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, onupdate=func.now())

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<alert(id={self.id}, name={self.name})>"

code:
-- Workflowの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Workflow
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- workflowのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Workflow
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

title: Bookmark のRailsコントローラ
description: Bookmark のRails APIコントローラ
code:
class BookmarkController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Bookmark, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = bookmark.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Bookmark
  end

  def create
    @Bookmark = bookmark.new(Bookmark_params)
    if @Bookmark.save
      render json: @bookmark, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Bookmark.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Bookmark
    @bookmark = Bookmark.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Bookmark_params
    params.require(:bookmark).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Milestone の監視スクリプト
description: Milestone のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Milestone/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Milestone health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] milestone health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

{

services:
  Thread-app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://user:pass@Thread-db:5432/thread
      - REDIS_URL=redis://Thread-cache:6379
    depends_on:
      Thread-db:
        condition: service_healthy

  thread-db:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: Thread
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: pass
    volumes:
      - Thread-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready"]
      interval: 5s

volumes:
  thread-data:

title: Report の監視スクリプト
description: Report のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Report/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Report health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] report health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1

title: Permission のSQLAlchemyモデル
description: Permission のSQLAlchemyモデル定義
code:
from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from database import Base


class Permission(Base):
    __tablename__ = "Permission"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    status = Column(String(20), default="active")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, onupdate=func.now())

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<permission(id={self.id}, name={self.name})>"

title: Event の集計クエリ
description: Event の分析用SQLクエリ
code:
-- Eventの月別集計
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'active') AS active_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'inactive') AS inactive_count
FROM Event
WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC;

-- eventのステータス別割合
SELECT
    status,
    COUNT(*) AS count,
    ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 2) AS percentage
FROM Event
GROUP BY status
ORDER BY count DESC;

title: Message のRailsコントローラ
description: Message のRails APIコントローラ
code:
class MessageController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Message, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = message.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Message
  end

  def create
    @Message = message.new(Message_params)
    if @Message.save
      render json: @message, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Message.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Message
    @message = Message.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Message_params
    params.require(:message).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

APP_NAME="Payment-service"
ENV="staging"
VERSION=$(git describe --tags --always)

echo "Deploying $APP_NAME v$VERSION to $ENV"

# Build
docker build -t "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" .

# Run migrations
docker run --rm \
  --env-file ".env.$ENV" \
  "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" \
  php artisan migrate --force

# Deploy
docker tag "$APP_NAME:$VERSION" "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"
docker push "registry.example.com/$APP_NAME:$VERSION"

echo "Deploy complete!"

from sqlalchemy import Column, Integer, String, DateTime, Text
from sqlalchemy.sql import func
from database import Base


class Log(Base):
    __tablename__ = "Log"

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255), nullable=False)
    description = Column(Text, nullable=True)
    status = Column(String(20), default="active")
    created_at = Column(DateTime, server_default=func.now())
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, onupdate=func.now())

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"<log(id={self.id}, name={self.name})>"

class ReviewController < ApplicationController
  before_action :set_Review, only: [:show, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @items = review.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page]).per(20)
    render json: @items
  end

  def show
    render json: @Review
  end

  def create
    @Review = review.new(Review_params)
    if @Review.save
      render json: @review, status: :created
    else
      render json: { errors: @Review.errors }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  private

  def set_Review
    @review = Review.find(params[:id])
  end

  def Review_params
    params.require(:review).permit(:name, :description)
  end
end

title: Permission の監視スクリプト
description: Permission のヘルスチェックスクリプト
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ENDPOINT="http://localhost:8080/Permission/health"
MAX_RETRIES=5
RETRY_INTERVAL=10

check_health() {
  local status
  status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%%{http_code}' "$ENDPOINT")
  [ "$status" = "200" ]
}

for i in $(seq 1 $MAX_RETRIES); do
  if check_health; then
    echo "[$(date)] Permission health check passed"
    exit 0
  fi
  echo "[$(date)] Attempt $i/$MAX_RETRIES failed, retrying in ${RETRY_INTERVAL}s..."
  sleep $RETRY_INTERVAL
done

echo "[$(date)] permission health check failed after $MAX_RETRIES attempts"
exit 1
